message:
fix: resolve hydration mismatches and harden OG image proxy security

SSR/hydration fixes:
- glow-orbits: add isMounted guard to prevent navigator.userAgent
  hydration mismatch on server render
- notable-stargazers: wrap date in <time> with suppressHydrationWarning
  and explicit en-US locale for consistent server/client rendering
- article-progress: default progress to 0 instead of 1 when scroll
  range is invalid to prevent misleading full progress bar flash
- analytics: remove duplicate gtag("config") call that caused double-
  counting of initial page views

OG image proxy hardening:
- Add post-redirect domain validation to prevent SSRF via open redirects
- Simplify buffering with response.arrayBuffer() replacing manual stream
  chunk reading (~25 lines removed)
- Include upstream statusText and actual error messages in error
  responses for easier debugging

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
